quote_last: , and the sun was rising, a delicate, white blotch in a grayish sky. The plane took off, and she made sure to take a last look at Boston Harbor, which was covered in ice. She knew she wouldn't be back anytime soon.
title: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow
author: Gabrielle Zevin

quote_first: And to see if maybe - just maybe - she might have answered him, even though it was now
quote_time_case: six minutes before seven in the morning
title: Her Billionaires
author: Julia Kent
